title: Types of AI Technology
concept:
The AI field contains several distinct technology families, each with different mechanisms and use cases.

**Machine Learning (ML)** enables systems to learn from data without explicit programming. It subdivides into supervised learning (labelled data), unsupervised learning (unlabelled data), and reinforcement learning (reward-based feedback). ML is a **subset of AI**.

**Deep Learning (DL)** uses multi-layer artificial neural networks (DNNs, CNNs, RNNs) to learn hierarchical representations. DL is a **subset of ML** — it is ML, but not all ML is DL.

**Generative AI** creates new content (text, images, audio, code) by learning patterns from training data. Large Language Models are a prominent example.

**Expert Systems** encode domain knowledge in a knowledge base and use an inference engine to derive conclusions — a rule-based approach popular before modern ML.

**Search Algorithms** (e.g., A*) find optimal or near-optimal solutions in problem spaces.

**Fuzzy Logic** handles reasoning with degrees of truth rather than binary true/false.

**Natural Language Processing (NLP)** enables machines to understand and generate human language.

The containment relationship is: AI ⊃ ML ⊃ DL. Testing strategies differ per technology type: rule-based systems suit structured testing; ML systems require statistical approaches.
keyPoints: ML is a subset of AI; Deep Learning is a subset of ML — not all AI is ML, and not all ML is Deep Learning.
AI technology types include ML, Deep Learning, Generative AI, Expert Systems, Search Algorithms, Fuzzy Logic, and NLP.
Each AI technology type has different mechanisms, requiring testers to adapt their testing approaches accordingly.

quiz.question: Which of the following correctly describes the containment relationship between AI, Machine Learning, and Deep Learning?
options: AI = Machine Learning = Deep Learning (they are the same thing)
quiz.explanation: AI is the broadest field, Machine Learning is a subset of AI, and Deep Learning is a subset of Machine Learning. Therefore the correct containment is AI ⊃ ML ⊃ DL.
